mapper.select: select o.outbound_id, o.outbound_date, o.outbound_request_date, o.outbound_status, o.outbound_amount, p.product_name, o.reject_reason_message from outbound_table o join product p on o.product_id = p.product_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outbound_table o JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.outbound_status = #{status}
mapper.update: update outbound_table set outbound_status = #{newStatus}, admin_id = #{adminId}, outbound_date = now(), reject_reason_message = #{msg} where outbound_id = #{outboundId};

UPDATE stock_table s JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.product_id JOIN outbound_table o ON o.product_id = p.product_id SET s.stock_amount = s.stock_amount - o.outbound_amount WHERE o.outbound_status = '승인' AND o.outbound_id = #{outboundId} AND s.stock_amount >= o.outbound_amount;
mapper.select: SELECT distinct s.stock_amount, o.outbound_amount FROM stock_table s JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.product_id JOIN outbound_table o ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.outbound_id = #{outboundId};
